name: Send receipt PDFs for Stripe payments using AI and TemplateFox

parameters.content:
## Send receipt PDFs for Stripe payments using AI and TemplateFox

Automatically generate and email receipt PDFs when a Stripe payment succeeds. An AI Agent categorizes the payment and extracts customer details, then TemplateFox generates a professional receipt PDF.

### Who is this for?
SaaS companies, e-commerce stores, and service providers who want automated receipt generation for every Stripe payment.

### How it works
1. Stripe Trigger fires on successful charges
2. AI Agent categorizes the payment (subscription, one-time, donation) and extracts customer details
3. Code node parses the AI response into structured receipt data
4. TemplateFox generates a professional receipt PDF
5. Receipt is emailed to the customer

### How to set up (~5 min)
1. Install the **TemplateFox** community node from Settings → Community Nodes
2. Add your **Stripe**, **OpenAI**, **TemplateFox API** credentials
3. Select your receipt template in the TemplateFox node dropdown
4. Update the sender email address in the Send Receipt Email node

### Requirements
- TemplateFox API key — [get one free at app.templatefox.com](https://app.templatefox.com)
- OpenAI API key
- Stripe account with webhook access
- Gmail account with OAuth2

**Note:** This template uses the [TemplateFox community node](https://www.npmjs.com/package/n8n-nodes-templatefox). Install it from Settings → Community Nodes.

### 1. Stripe Trigger
Fires on every successful charge. Customize the event type if needed.

### 2. AI Categorization
AI reads the Stripe charge data and extracts receipt fields + payment category.

### 3. Parse Data
Parses the AI JSON response into structured receipt data.

### 4. Generate PDF
TemplateFox generates the receipt PDF. Select your template in the dropdown.

### 5. Send Receipt
Emails the receipt PDF link to the customer. Update the sender email.

options.systemMessage:
You are a payment categorization assistant. Analyze the Stripe charge data and return a JSON object with:

- receipt_number: generate as REC-YYYY-XXXX
- date: payment date in YYYY-MM-DD format
- customer_name: from charge customer info or metadata
- customer_email: from charge receipt_email or customer email
- amount: formatted amount (e.g. "49.99")
- currency: currency symbol ($ for usd, etc.)
- payment_method: card brand + last 4 (e.g. "Visa ending in 4242")
- description: charge description or product name
- category: one of "subscription", "one-time", "donation", "service"
- items: array with [{description, quantity: 1, unit_price}]

Respond with ONLY the JSON, no explanation.

parameters.subject: =Payment Receipt {{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.receipt_number }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.customer_name }},

Thank you for your payment of {{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.currency }}{{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.amount }}.

Receipt #: {{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.receipt_number }}
Date: {{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.date }}
Payment Method: {{ $('Parse Receipt Data').item.json.payment_method }}

Download Receipt PDF

Thank you for your business!
